title: Doraemon the Movie: Nobita and the Birth of Japan
original_title: 映画ドラえもん 新・のび太の日本誕生
overview: Doraemon and his friends travel to ancient Japan where they meet Kukuru. When Kukuru tells them that his tribe has been enslaved by Gigazombie, Doraemon decides to help him.
